'''ngolashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocular|vocular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocular|vocular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngolashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngolashithi|ngolashithi]] || [[word:ngolashiji|ngolashiji]] || [[word:ngolashishi|ngolashishi]] || [[word:ngolashiki|ngolashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngolashuthuthu|ngolashuthuthu]] || [[word:ngolashujuju|ngolashujuju]] || [[word:ngolashushushu|ngolashushushu]] || [[word:ngolashukuku|ngolashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngolashuthu|ngolashuthu]] || [[word:ngolashuju|ngolashuju]] || [[word:ngolashushu|ngolashushu]] || [[word:ngolashuku|ngolashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngolashufthuf|ngolashufthuf]] || [[word:ngolashufjuf|ngolashufjuf]] || [[word:ngolashufshuf|ngolashufshuf]] || [[word:ngolashufkuf|ngolashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngolashethe|ngolashethe]] || [[word:ngolasheje|ngolasheje]] || [[word:ngolasheshe|ngolasheshe]] || [[word:ngolasheke|ngolasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngolashothotho|ngolashothotho]] || [[word:ngolashojojo|ngolashojojo]] || [[word:ngolashoshosho|ngolashoshosho]] || [[word:ngolashokoko|ngolashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngolashotho|ngolashotho]] || [[word:ngolashojo|ngolashojo]] || [[word:ngolashosho|ngolashosho]] || [[word:ngolashoko|ngolashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngolashofthof|ngolashofthof]] || [[word:ngolashofjof|ngolashofjof]] || [[word:ngolashofshof|ngolashofshof]] || [[word:ngolashofkof|ngolashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngolashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngolashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngolashĂŠthĂŠ|ngolashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngolashĂŠjĂŠ|ngolashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngolashĂŠshĂŠ|ngolashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngolashĂŠkĂŠ|ngolashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngolashathatha|ngolashathatha]] || [[word:ngolashajaja|ngolashajaja]] || [[word:ngolashashasha|ngolashashasha]] || [[word:ngolashakaka|ngolashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngolashatha|ngolashatha]] || [[word:ngolashaja|ngolashaja]] || [[word:ngolashasha|ngolashasha]] || [[word:ngolashaka|ngolashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngolashafthaf|ngolashafthaf]] || [[word:ngolashafjaf|ngolashafjaf]] || [[word:ngolashafshaf|ngolashafshaf]] || [[word:ngolashafkaf|ngolashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngolashasha|ngolashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngolashĂ«sha|ngolashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngolashrosha|ngolashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngolashmusha|ngolashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngolashyasha|ngolashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongolashnkshĂ«sha|gongolashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongolashnkrosha|gongolashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongolashnkmusha|gongolashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongolashnkyasha|gongolashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngolalashasha|ngolalashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngolalashĂ«sha|ngolalashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngolalashrosha|ngolalashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngolalashmusha|ngolalashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngolalashyasha|ngolalashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongolalashnkshĂ«sha|gongolalashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongolalashnkrosha|gongolalashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongolalashnkmusha|gongolalashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongolalashnkyasha|gongolalashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngelĂŠshasha|ngelĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngelĂŠshĂ«sha|ngelĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngelĂŠshrosha|ngelĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngelĂŠshmusha|ngelĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngelĂŠshyasha|ngelĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongelĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gongelĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongelĂŠshnkrosha|gongelĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongelĂŠshnkmusha|gongelĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongelĂŠshnkyasha|gongelĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngolfashasha|ngolfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngolfashĂ«sha|ngolfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngolfashrosha|ngolfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngolfashmusha|ngolfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngolfashyasha|ngolfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongolfashnkshĂ«sha|gongolfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongolfashnkrosha|gongolfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongolfashnkmusha|gongolfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongolfashnkyasha|gongolfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
